battle.name: Battle of Naboo
battle.turning_point: Anakin Skywalker destroys the Trade Federation droid control ship, deactivating the droid army.
battle.outcome_summary: Naboo is liberated, the Trade Federation occupation collapses, and Palpatine's political rise accelerates.

battle.name: First Battle of Geonosis
objectives: rescue captured Jedi and Republic officials
battle.turning_point: Yoda arrives with the Grand Army of the Republic, preventing the execution of the Jedi strike team.
battle.outcome_summary: The Republic wins the first major engagement of the Clone Wars, but Count Dooku escapes with strategic plans.

battle.name: Battle of Coruscant
objectives: capture or kill Count Dooku and General Grievous
battle.turning_point: Anakin Skywalker kills Count Dooku aboard the Invisible Hand during the rescue of Palpatine.
battle.outcome_summary: The Republic capital survives, but the battle pushes Anakin closer to the dark side and sets up the fall of the Jedi.

battle.name: Assault on the Jedi Temple
battle.turning_point: Anakin Skywalker leads the 501st Legion into the Jedi Temple as Darth Vader.
battle.outcome_summary: The Jedi Temple falls, most Jedi inside are killed, and the Sith complete their seizure of galactic power.

battle.name: Duel on Mustafar
battle.turning_point: Obi-Wan Kenobi gains the high ground and defeats Anakin Skywalker.
battle.outcome_summary: Anakin is physically ruined, Padmé dies soon after, and Darth Vader is rebuilt as an armored Sith enforcer.

battle.name: Battle of Scarif
battle.turning_point: The Rebel fleet breaks the shield gate and receives the Death Star plans from Scarif's archive tower.
battle.outcome_summary: Rogue One is wiped out, but the Rebellion obtains the Death Star plans that make the Battle of Yavin possible.

battle.name: Battle of Yavin
battle.turning_point: Luke Skywalker trusts the Force and fires proton torpedoes into the thermal exhaust port.
battle.outcome_summary: The first Death Star is destroyed, the Rebel Alliance survives, and Luke Skywalker becomes a galactic hero.

battle.name: Battle of Hoth
battle.turning_point: Imperial walkers destroy the shield generator, forcing the Rebels to abandon Echo Base.
battle.outcome_summary: The Empire captures the base, but most Rebel leadership escapes and the Alliance survives.

battle.name: Occupation of Cloud City
battle.turning_point: Darth Vader defeats Luke Skywalker and reveals that he is Luke's father.
battle.outcome_summary: Han Solo is captured by Boba Fett, Cloud City is occupied, and Luke survives a devastating confrontation.

battle.name: Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon
objectives: survive execution at the Sarlacc pit
battle.turning_point: R2-D2 launches Luke Skywalker's lightsaber, allowing him to break the execution trap.
battle.outcome_summary: Han is rescued, Jabba is killed, and the Hutt Cartel's grip on Tatooine weakens.

battle.name: Battle of Endor
objectives: turn Darth Vader away from the Sith
battle.turning_point: The shield generator is destroyed, letting Rebel fighters attack the Death Star's reactor core.
battle.outcome_summary: The Emperor is defeated, Darth Vader is redeemed, the second Death Star is destroyed, and the Empire begins to collapse.

battle.name: Battle of Jakku
battle.turning_point: New Republic forces break the Imperial fleet and force the surviving Imperial leadership toward surrender.
battle.outcome_summary: The Empire suffers its final major conventional defeat, leading to the Galactic Concordance.

battle.name: Battle of Starkiller Base
battle.turning_point: Poe Dameron leads the starfighter attack that destroys the thermal oscillator.
battle.outcome_summary: Starkiller Base is destroyed, but Han Solo dies and the First Order remains militarily dangerous.

battle.name: Battle of Crait
battle.turning_point: Luke Skywalker's Force projection distracts Kylo Ren long enough for the Resistance to escape.
battle.outcome_summary: The First Order captures the base, but the Resistance survives and Luke's final act becomes a symbol of hope.

battle.name: Battle of Exegol
battle.turning_point: The Citizens' Fleet arrives above Exegol, overwhelming the Final Order's isolated fleet.
battle.outcome_summary: Palpatine and the Final Order are destroyed, Ben Solo is redeemed, and the Sith Eternal collapses.

battle.name: Siege of Mandalore
battle.turning_point: Ahsoka Tano defeats Maul in single combat and Republic-aligned Mandalorians regain control.
battle.outcome_summary: Maul is captured, but Order 66 begins almost immediately afterward, transforming the Republic victory into chaos.

battle.name: Massacre of the Nightsisters
battle.turning_point: General Grievous leads a full droid assault that overwhelms Nightsister defenses.
battle.outcome_summary: The Nightsisters are nearly exterminated and Ventress loses her clan support.

battle.name: Liberation of Lothal
battle.turning_point: Ezra Bridger summons purrgil that carry Thrawn's Star Destroyer away into hyperspace.
battle.outcome_summary: Lothal is freed from Imperial rule, but Ezra and Thrawn disappear into unknown space.

battle.name: Battle of Nevarro
battle.turning_point: Grogu uses the Force to save Din Djarin's group from fire.
battle.outcome_summary: The local Imperial Remnant is defeated, and Din Djarin commits to protecting Grogu.

battle.name: Destruction of Tipoca City
battle.turning_point: Imperial warships bombard and sink Tipoca City, ending Kamino's role as the clone army's center.
battle.outcome_summary: Kamino's cloning facilities are destroyed, and Clone Force 99 barely escapes.

battle.name: Reclamation of Mandalore
battle.turning_point: Mandalorian forces retake the Great Forge and destroy Gideon's underground base.
battle.outcome_summary: Mandalore is reclaimed and the clans begin reunification under Bo-Katan Kryze.

battle.name: Battle of Mount Tantiss
battle.turning_point: Omega helps trigger a coordinated prison break that overwhelms Tantiss security.
battle.outcome_summary: Clone Force 99 frees the prisoners, destroys key research, and escapes Imperial control.

planet.name: Tatooine
planet.short_description: A harsh desert world in the Outer Rim shaped by moisture farming, crime syndicates, and Skywalker history.

planet.name: Alderaan
planet.short_description: A peaceful Core World known for beauty, diplomacy, and tragedy after its destruction by the Death Star.

planet.name: Coruscant
planet.short_description: A planet-wide city and historic galactic capital housing the Senate, Jedi Temple, and Imperial power center.

planet.name: Naboo
planet.short_description: A lush Mid Rim world shared by humans and Gungans, famous for royal politics and Palpatine’s origin.

planet.name: Hoth
planet.short_description: A frozen and remote world used by the Rebel Alliance as Echo Base before the Imperial assault.

planet.name: Endor
planet.short_description: A forest moon inhabited by Ewoks and the site of the Empire’s decisive defeat at the second Death Star.

planet.name: Mustafar
planet.short_description: A volcanic world strong in the dark side, where Anakin Skywalker is defeated and transformed into Darth Vader.

planet.name: Kamino
planet.short_description: An oceanic world of advanced cloners who create the Republic’s clone army from Jango Fett’s template.

planet.name: Geonosis
planet.short_description: A hive world of droid factories and arenas where the Clone Wars begin.

planet.name: Dagobah
planet.short_description: A remote swamp world where Yoda hides in exile and trains Luke Skywalker.

planet.name: Yavin 4
planet.short_description: A jungle moon with ancient temples that serves as the Rebel base during the first Death Star attack.

planet.name: Corellia
planet.short_description: A major shipbuilding world known for freighters, pilots, industrial yards, and Han Solo’s origin.

planet.name: Kashyyyk
planet.short_description: The forested Wookiee homeworld, known for massive tree cities, warriors, and Imperial exploitation.

planet.name: Mandalore
planet.short_description: The ancestral Mandalorian homeworld, scarred by war, purges, and repeated struggles for cultural unity.

planet.name: Dathomir
planet.short_description: A dark and mystical world home to Nightsisters, Nightbrothers, rancors, and powerful Force traditions.

planet.name: Lothal
planet.short_description: A grassland world occupied by the Empire and later liberated by the Ghost crew.

planet.name: Jakku
planet.short_description: A desert scavenger world filled with wreckage from the final major battle of the Galactic Civil War.

planet.name: Exegol
planet.short_description: A hidden Sith world in the Unknown Regions containing ancient cults, shipyards, and Palpatine’s final stronghold.

planet.name: Ahch-To
planet.short_description: An oceanic island world believed to contain the first Jedi Temple and Luke Skywalker’s exile refuge.

planet.name: Bespin
planet.short_description: A gas giant famous for Cloud City, tibanna gas mining, and Luke’s confrontation with Darth Vader.

planet.name: Scarif
planet.short_description: A tropical Imperial archive world where Rogue One steals the Death Star plans.

planet.name: Jedha
planet.short_description: A sacred moon rich in kyber crystals and ancient Force traditions, devastated by the Death Star.

planet.name: Nevarro
planet.short_description: A volcanic Outer Rim world that shifts from bounty hunter hub to independent frontier settlement.

planet.name: Chandrila
planet.short_description: A peaceful Core World associated with Mon Mothma, the New Republic, and Ben Solo’s birth.

planet.name: Hosnian Prime
planet.short_description: A New Republic capital world destroyed by Starkiller Base in a devastating First Order attack.

planet.name: Starkiller Base
planet.short_description: A weaponized planet controlled by the First Order and used to destroy entire star systems.

planet.name: Ryloth
planet.short_description: The Twi’lek homeworld, often contested by outside powers and known for resistance movements.

planet.name: Polis Massa
planet.short_description: An asteroid medical outpost where Luke and Leia are born after the fall of the Republic.

planet.name: Serenno
planet.short_description: An aristocratic Outer Rim world and home of Count Dooku’s noble house.

planet.name: Onderon
planet.short_description: A jungle world with a history of resistance, beast riders, and Saw Gerrera’s early rebellion.

planet.name: Kenari
planet.short_description: A forested mining world tied to Cassian Andor’s childhood and early displacement.

planet.name: Pabu
planet.short_description: A peaceful island refuge where Clone Force 99 finds a chance at stability after years of war.

planet.name: Csilla
planet.short_description: The icy capital of the Chiss Ascendancy and homeworld of Grand Admiral Thrawn.

planet.name: Mon Cala
planet.short_description: An oceanic world known for Mon Calamari shipyards and major contributions to Rebel and Resistance fleets.

planet.name: Nal Hutta
planet.short_description: The polluted Hutt homeworld and political heart of Hutt cartel power.

planet.name: Nar Shaddaa
planet.short_description: A dense crime-ridden moon of Nal Hutta known for smugglers, bounty hunters, and black-market activity.

planet.name: Ilum
planet.short_description: A sacred Jedi crystal world later transformed by the First Order into Starkiller Base.

planet.name: Tython
planet.short_description: An ancient Jedi world with Force-sensitive ruins, including the seeing stone used by Grogu.

starship.name: Millennium Falcon
known_aliases: Fastest hunk of junk in the galaxy

starship.name: Din Djarin's N-1 Starfighter
starship.manufacturer: Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps

starship.name: Home One
starship.model: MC80 Home One type Star Cruiser

starship.name: Naboo Royal Starship
starship.manufacturer: Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps

starship.name: Naboo N-1 Starfighter
starship.manufacturer: Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps

character.name: Luke Skywalker
character.short_description: A farm boy from Tatooine who becomes a Jedi Master and one of the central heroes of the Rebellion.

character.name: Leia Organa
character.short_description: Alderaanian princess, Rebel leader, senator, general, and Force-sensitive member of the Skywalker family.

character.name: Han Solo
character.short_description: A Corellian smuggler and gifted pilot who becomes a key general in the Rebel Alliance.

character.name: Chewbacca
character.short_description: A loyal Wookiee warrior, mechanic, and co-pilot of the Millennium Falcon.

character.name: Anakin Skywalker
character.short_description: A powerful Force-sensitive child from Tatooine whose fall to the dark side reshapes galactic history.

character.name: Darth Vader
character.short_description: The armored Sith Lord formerly known as Anakin Skywalker and chief enforcer of the Galactic Empire.

character.name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
character.short_description: A Jedi Master, Clone Wars general, and mentor to both Anakin and Luke Skywalker.

character.name: Yoda
character.short_description: Ancient Grand Master of the Jedi Order, known for wisdom, discipline, and deep command of the Force.

character.name: Sheev Palpatine
character.short_description: The Sith Lord Darth Sidious who manipulates the Republic into becoming the Galactic Empire.

character.name: Padmé Amidala
character.short_description: Queen and senator of Naboo whose political courage and secret marriage to Anakin shape the Skywalker legacy.

character.name: Qui-Gon Jinn
character.short_description: An unconventional Jedi Master who discovers Anakin Skywalker and believes strongly in the Living Force.

character.name: Mace Windu
character.short_description: A senior Jedi Council member and formidable warrior known for his purple lightsaber and strict judgment.

character.name: Count Dooku
character.short_description: A former Jedi Master turned Sith apprentice who becomes the political face of the Separatist movement.

character.name: Darth Maul
character.short_description: A Dathomirian Zabrak Sith assassin who survives betrayal and becomes a criminal warlord.

character.name: Ahsoka Tano
character.short_description: Anakin Skywalker’s former Padawan who leaves the Jedi Order and later becomes a key rebel intelligence figure.

character.name: Rey
character.short_description: A scavenger from Jakku who discovers her Force sensitivity and becomes central to the Jedi’s survival.

character.name: Ben Solo
character.short_description: The son of Han Solo and Leia Organa, trained by Luke before falling to the dark side and later seeking redemption.

character.name: Kylo Ren
character.short_description: Ben Solo’s dark-side identity as leader of the Knights of Ren and later Supreme Leader of the First Order.

character.name: Finn
character.short_description: A former First Order stormtrooper who defects and becomes a brave fighter for the Resistance.

character.name: Poe Dameron
character.short_description: A skilled Resistance pilot and commander known for daring attacks and loyalty to Leia Organa.

character.name: BB-8
character.short_description: A resourceful BB-series astromech droid and loyal companion to Poe Dameron and the Resistance.

character.name: R2-D2
character.short_description: A brave astromech droid involved in many major events from the Clone Wars through the Resistance era.

character.name: C-3PO
character.short_description: A protocol droid fluent in millions of languages and longtime companion to R2-D2 and the Skywalker family.

character.name: Lando Calrissian
character.short_description: A charismatic gambler, administrator, pilot, and Rebel general with deep underworld connections.

character.name: Boba Fett
character.short_description: A feared bounty hunter and unaltered clone of Jango Fett who later becomes a crime lord on Tatooine.

character.name: Jango Fett
character.short_description: A Mandalorian bounty hunter chosen as the genetic template for the Republic’s clone army.

character.name: Din Djarin
character.short_description: A Mandalorian bounty hunter whose bond with Grogu changes his loyalty, identity, and purpose.

character.name: Grogu
character.short_description: A young Force-sensitive being of Yoda’s species who becomes Din Djarin’s foundling.

character.name: Bo-Katan Kryze
character.short_description: A Mandalorian warrior and political leader seeking to reunite and reclaim Mandalore.

character.name: Wilhuff Tarkin
character.short_description: A ruthless Imperial governor who commands the first Death Star and embodies Imperial doctrine.

character.name: Mitth'raw'nuruodo
character.short_description: A brilliant Chiss strategist and Imperial Grand Admiral known for studying enemies through art and culture.

character.name: General Grievous
character.short_description: A cybernetic Separatist general and Jedi hunter who leads droid armies during the Clone Wars.

character.name: Rex
character.short_description: A respected clone captain of the 501st who serves with Anakin, Ahsoka, and later the Rebellion.

character.name: CC-2224 Cody
character.short_description: A clone marshal commander closely associated with Obi-Wan Kenobi during the Clone Wars.

character.name: Omega
character.short_description: A unique female clone from Kamino who becomes part of Clone Force 99’s found family.

character.name: Hunter
character.short_description: The enhanced clone sergeant and tracker who leads Clone Force 99 after the rise of the Empire.

character.name: Crosshair
character.short_description: A genetically enhanced clone marksman whose loyalty is tested between the Empire and his squad.

character.name: Wrecker
character.short_description: The physically powerful demolitions expert of Clone Force 99 with a loyal and emotional nature.

character.name: Tech
character.short_description: The analytical engineer and pilot of Clone Force 99, known for technical brilliance and calm logic.

character.name: Echo
character.short_description: A clone trooper turned cyborg specialist who joins Clone Force 99 after surviving Separatist captivity.

character.name: Jyn Erso
character.short_description: A rebel operative whose personal connection to the Death Star project helps the Alliance steal its plans.

character.name: Cassian Andor
character.short_description: A Rebel intelligence officer and spy whose sacrifices help deliver the Death Star plans.

character.name: K-2SO
character.short_description: A reprogrammed Imperial security droid who becomes Cassian Andor’s blunt and loyal companion.

character.name: Saw Gerrera
character.short_description: An extremist rebel partisan whose uncompromising methods make him both valuable and controversial.

character.name: Ezra Bridger
character.short_description: A Force-sensitive orphan from Lothal who becomes a Jedi apprentice and rebel liberator.

character.name: Kanan Jarrus
character.short_description: A Jedi survivor of Order 66 who hides his identity before mentoring Ezra Bridger.

character.name: Hera Syndulla
character.short_description: A Twi’lek pilot and Rebel general who leads the Ghost crew with discipline and compassion.

character.name: Sabine Wren
character.short_description: A Mandalorian artist, explosives expert, rebel fighter, and later apprentice to Ahsoka Tano.

character.name: Garazeb Orrelios
character.short_description: A Lasat warrior and former honor guard who becomes a core member of the Ghost crew.

character.name: C1-10P Chopper
character.short_description: A chaotic but loyal astromech droid serving Hera Syndulla and the Ghost crew.

character.name: Asajj Ventress
character.short_description: A Dathomirian assassin trained by Dooku who later becomes a bounty hunter and ambiguous antihero.

character.name: Mother Talzin
character.short_description: The powerful Nightsister matriarch of Dathomir and mother of Darth Maul.

character.name: Snoke
character.short_description: A dark-side strandcast ruler used by Palpatine to control the First Order and manipulate Kylo Ren.

character.name: Armitage Hux
character.short_description: A fanatical First Order general whose ambition and rivalry with Kylo Ren shape its military politics.

character.name: Rose Tico
character.short_description: A Resistance mechanic whose moral clarity and technical skill support the fight against the First Order.

character.name: Maz Kanata
character.short_description: An ancient pirate queen and castle owner with deep knowledge of galactic history and Force-sensitive artifacts.

character.name: Jabba Desilijic Tiure
character.short_description: A powerful Hutt crime lord who controls much of Tatooine’s underworld from his palace.

character.name: Greedo
character.short_description: A Rodian bounty hunter working for Jabba who confronts Han Solo in Mos Eisley.

character.name: Wicket W. Warrick
character.short_description: A young Ewok scout who helps Leia and the Rebel Alliance during the Battle of Endor.
